sub_modules.mac_cell: Combinational signed 32-bit by 32-bit multiplier producing a 64-bit product for each systolic array cell.
sub_modules.data_forward: Combinational 32-bit forwarding helper for systolic data movement.
sub_modules.done_logic: Combinational completion flag generator for the 9-cycle matrix multiplication latency.
sub_modules.pe: Combinational processing element interface that forwards north/west data and computes the current signed product.
